name: Equity Research Assistant — Daily Stock Analysis

nodes.name: 📂 Read Stock Pool (File)
nodes.notes: Alternatively use Google Sheets node to read your stock list

nodes.name: 📊 Compute Indicators (JS)
nodes.notes: For production, replace with Execute Command node calling indicator_engine.py

nodes.name: 🌐 Fetch Yahoo Finance OHLCV
nodes.notes: Fetches 6 months daily OHLCV data. Free, no API key needed.

nodes.name: 🌐 Send to Dashboard (Webhook)
nodes.notes: Optional: POST results to your self-hosted dashboard

meta.description: Daily equity research assistant. Fetches OHLCV from Yahoo Finance, computes 25+ indicators, scores stocks, fetches news sentiment, and sends a daily briefing via Telegram.
